endpoints.name: Get arrival board of a location
endpoints.description: Get arrival board at a given location at a given daten and time.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get departure board of a location
endpoints.description: Get departure board at a given location at a given daten and time.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get details about a single journey
endpoints.description: Retrieve details of a journey. The id of journey should come from an arrival board or a departure board.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get location information
endpoints.description: Get information about locations matching the given name or name fragment
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.
